name: 3M™ Durable Label Material 7850-IJ, Matte White Polyester, H2O Inkjet Printable, Roll, Config
short_description: 3M™ Durable Label Material 7850-IJ is a water inkjet printable label-stock. This product utilizes 3M™ Adhesive 350, designed to provide good adhesion to high and low surface energy plastics and metal.
benefits: Durable label stock makes for precise, efficient production
Facestock is suitable to be printed via water inkjet
Adhesive resists oozing and provides strength on a variety of surfaces

discovery.title: 3M™ Durable Label Material 7850-IJ, Matte White Polyester, H2O Inkjet Printable, Roll, Config
